import React from 'react'; import { motion } from 'framer-motion'; import { Fuel, Droplets, CreditCard, BarChart3, TrendingDown, Info, Zap, Calendar } from 'lucide-react'; import api from '../utils/api'; const FuelLogs = () => { const [fuelLogs, setFuelLogs] = React.useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(true); React.useEffect(() => { const fetchFuelLogs = async () => { try { const response = await api.get('/fuel'); if (response.success) { setFuelLogs(response.data); } } catch (error) { console.error("Failed to fetch fuel logs", error); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; fetchFuelLogs(); }, []); return (

Total Liters

12,450 L

Avg Efficiency

4.2 KM/L

Monthly Spend

$45,200

Fuel Variance

-2.4%

Recent Refuel Events

{fuelLogs.map((log) => (

{log.vehicleId?.name || 'Unknown'}

{log.vehicleId?.licensePlate}

Quantity

{log.liters} L

Total Cost

${log.cost.toLocaleString()}

Station

Verified Log

{new Date(log.date).toLocaleDateString()}

))}
); }; export default FuelLogs;
